title: main: unnecessary String clones of pub_id in event paths
description:
pub_id is a 64-char hex string cloned multiple times: line 190 (Connected event), line 228 (Whoami), line 264 (self-test). These are pass-through paths where to_string() is called on an already-owned String.

Cost: Per-event allocation in critical event dispatch loop.

Fix: Use references or Cow to avoid cloning in hot paths. Consider if BotEvent can accept &str or Cow<str> for pub_id.
close_reason: false positive: to_string() allocations on &str are required for struct fields; no alternative
